articles.title: Can't make sense of Dashlane's vault theft notification? You're not alone.
articles.content: Security advisory leaves out key details. Dashlane maintains complete silence.
articles.titleZh: 无法理解Dashlane的保管库盗窃通知？你并不孤单。
articles.contentZh: 安全警告漏掉了关键细节。Dashlane保持完全安静。

articles.title: Dozens of Red Hat packages backdoored through its official NPM channel
articles.content: Anyone who has downloaded affected Red Hat packages should investigate immediately.
articles.titleZh: 数十个红帽软件包通过其官方NPM渠道进行后门
articles.contentZh: 下载受影响的红帽软件包的任何人都应立即进行调查。

articles.title: Botnet of more than 17 million devices dismantled
articles.content: The botnet was reportedly tied to a Russia-based residential proxy network.
articles.titleZh: 拆除了超过1700万台设备的僵尸网络
articles.contentZh: 据报道，该僵尸网络与一家位于俄罗斯的住宅代理网络连接。

articles.title: Fed up with vibe coders, dev sneaks data-nuking prompt injection into their code
articles.content: Undisclosed addition in jqwik instructed AI coding agents to delete app output.
articles.titleZh: 受够了vibe编码器，开发人员将数据核对提示注入到他们的代码中
articles.contentZh: Jqwik中未公开的添加指示AI编码代理删除应用输出。

articles.title: AI leaders call for tougher protections against AI-aided bioweapons
articles.content: Some of the AI industry's biggest rivals have put their many, many grievances aside for a common cause: making it harder for people to use their technology to develop biological weapons. In an open letter to US lawmakers, tech leaders are pressing Congress to enact rules closing what they say is an alarming biosecurity gap […]
articles.titleZh: 人工智能领导人呼吁加强对人工智能辅助生物武器的保护
articles.contentZh: 人工智能行业的一些最大竞争对手已经将他们的许多不满放在一边，因为一个共同的原因：让人们更难使用他们的技术来开发生物武器。在给美国立法者的一封公开信中，技术领导人正在敦促国会制定规则，弥补他们所说的令人担忧的生物安全差距[…]

articles.title: Yes, the Oura Ring 5 is noticeably smaller
articles.content: This is not an Oura Ring 5 review. That's coming later, once I've had enough time to really test the new durability and battery life claims, plus the new software updates that start rolling out today. In the meantime, I did want to provide an answer to a burning question that I've seen asked in […]
articles.titleZh: 是的， Oura Ring 5明显更小
articles.contentZh: 这不是Oura Ring 5的评价。稍后推出，一旦我有足够的时间真正测试新的耐用性和电池寿命声明，以及今天开始推出的新软件更新。与此同时，我确实想为我在[…]中看到的一个炙手可热的问题提供答案
